name: zvideo_set_renderer_type_and_active_path
description: zVideo::SetRendererTypeAndActivePath returns the previous renderer type and writes the requested backend to both renderer-selection globals.
binary_safe_evidence: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare passed with zero unmasked mismatches after masking 12 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 18 bytes and the VC object body is 32 bytes with 14 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.
The native smoke verifies the previous renderer return value and both g_zVideo_RendererType and g_zVideo_ActiveRendererPath updates.
